areas.name: State & Local Politics
areas.description: How state governments occupy a distinctive middle ground in the federal system, with consequences for policy and representation.

areas.name: Public Finance
areas.description: The politics of taxation, spending, debt, municipal bankruptcy, and fiscal transparency at the state and local level.

areas.name: Interest Groups & Democratic Inequality
areas.description: How organized interests, nonprofits, and community organizations shape governance and resource allocation in cities.

areas.name: Elections & Representation
areas.description: How electoral rules—including at-large vs. district systems and primary competition—affect minority representation and political outcomes.

areas.name: Education Policy
areas.description: The politics and effects of school district spending, property taxes, and parent organizations on student outcomes.

areas.name: Voter Behavior & Information
areas.description: How citizens process information about government fiscal performance and respond to it at the ballot box.
